query: SELECT bo.id, bo.phone, sp.local_id, sp.name, sp.package_price, sp.is_active, sp.created_at FROM business_owners bo LEFT JOIN service_packages sp ON sp.business_owner_id = bo.id WHERE bo.phone = '4124827733' OR bo.phone = '+14124827733' ORDER BY sp.created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
